title: American Chicken Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make American-style stir fry dish made with crispy chicken, crunchy vegetables, and savory sauce. Perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: Heat the garlicky oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the diced crispy bacon and cook until crispy, then set aside.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the stir-fry mix to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Return the crispy bacon to the skillet and add the American stir fry sauce.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped green onions if desired.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
